title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Boat - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Boat - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Boat! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Boat:
Boat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat!
